# meshoptimizer

Nullus vendors the mesh simplification portion of meshoptimizer v0.25 from
https://github.com/zeux/meshoptimizer at commit
`6daea4695c48338363b08022d2fb15deaef6ac09`.

Only `meshoptimizer.h` and `simplifier.cpp` are included because Nullus uses
the library solely to build persistent editor preview LODs. See `LICENSE.md`
for the upstream MIT license.
